Long Scrollable Page for Vision Testing

This page is designed to test scroll-based vision navigation.

Section 1: Introduction

This is the first section at the top of the page. It contains introductory content.

Target Element 1: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

Section 2: Features

This section is located in the middle of the page.

Target Element 2: PageGuide supports vision-based question answering.
  • Feature A: Automatic element indexing
  • Feature B: Screenshot capture
  • Feature C: Intelligent scrolling

Section 3: Technical Details

Deep in the page, you'll find technical information.

Target Element 3: The system uses GPT-4 Vision for image understanding.

The architecture consists of content scripts, a background service worker, and a side panel interface.

Section 4: Performance Metrics

Performance data is stored here at the bottom.

Target Element 4: Average response time is 2.3 seconds.
Metric Value
Response Time 2.3s
Accuracy 94%
User Satisfaction 4.8/5

Section 5: Conclusion

This is the final section at the very bottom of the page.

Target Element 5: Thank you for testing PageGuide!

We hope this tool helps make your browsing experience more productive.

Scroll: 0%
